name: Barinhall Delivery Hub
description: Internal client engagement and delivery management tool for Barinhall LLC.

phases.1: Dashboard, new engagement form, workflow checklist, template library, localStorage persistence
phases.2A: Structured service forms, template status tracking, markdown preview generation
phases.2B: Notes log, decision log, risk/blocker register per engagement with create and edit
phases.3: Supabase auth + cloud storage; multi-device access; Netlify hosting; localStorage migration
phases.4: Output Center; document generation; zip export; completion validation; output manifest; naming convention
phases.5: n8n integration assets; webhook contracts; importable workflow JSONs; digest generator; reminder generator; DigestPage
